name: post_hoc_grouped_trial_sensitivity
purpose: Sensitivity check for the row-level overlapping-window split used by the frozen embedded parity target.
status: post-hoc offline analysis; not used as the embedded parity target and not replayed on ESP32
model_note: Used the same exported logistic-regression feature/classification pipeline family as the embedded parity analysis; included to quantify sensitivity to overlap leakage rather than to replace the frozen benchmark target.
interpretation: The grouped-trial result is lower than the row-level benchmark, consistent with the acknowledged risk that overlapping row-level windows inflate the frozen benchmark metrics. The ESP32 validation demonstrates parity with the frozen benchmark implementation, not leakage-free generalization.
